scripts.prepare:cores:windows: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File src-tauri/binaries/fetch-aether.ps1 -Version v1.3.0 && powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File src-tauri/binaries/fetch-singbox.ps1 -Version v1.13.14
scripts.prepare:cores:unix: bash src-tauri/binaries/fetch-aether.sh --version v1.3.0 && bash src-tauri/binaries/fetch-singbox.sh --version v1.13.14
scripts.build:windows:exe: pnpm prepare:cores:windows && pnpm verify:bundled-cores:windows && tauri build --no-bundle
scripts.build:windows:setup:unsigned: pnpm prepare:cores:windows && pnpm verify:bundled-cores:windows && tauri build --bundles nsis --config src-tauri/tauri.conf.unsigned.json
scripts.build:windows:setup: pnpm prepare:cores:windows && pnpm verify:bundled-cores:windows && node scripts/require-tauri-signing.mjs && tauri build --bundles nsis
scripts.validate: pnpm verify:version && pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm check:rust && pnpm test:rust && pnpm clippy:rust && cargo fmt --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml -- --check
